scene.message: Yukino: Wait, could you be...{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: Wait, Sonomura!!{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: ......{waitkey}{ret}
There's nothing here.{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: Sonomura...?{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: Sonomura...{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: The paint on this{nl} canvas isn't dry yet.{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: An illusion?{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Was someone here{nl} just a moment ago?{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Huh?{nl} Isn't that Maki?{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: So someone unfrozen{nl} was here until just now.{waitkey}{ret}
